arts.ttl: Wolves midfielder Gomes signs new five-year deal
arts.sum: Wolves midfielder Joao Gomes signs a new five-year deal at Molineux.

Gomes had never played outside of his boyhood club Flamengo until his Molineux switch in January 2023, however a debut goal at Southampton – a winner three minutes from time – instantly endeared him to the Old Gold faithful and made him the youngest ever Brazilian to score in the Premier League. During those first four months in the West Midlands, Gomes, affectionately known as ‘The Pitbull’, gained a taste for the level, while helping the club to Premier League survival, coming on strong at the business end of the campaign.
